fields.name: Select by
fields.description: Search for billing analysis by selecting a means to search by (e.g. technician, type or reason).

fields.description: Select the means to subtotal the billing analysis by                 search results by (e.g. technician, type, or reason).

fields.description: If selected, includes specific billing types within the

fields.name: Type

fields.description: Search for billing analysis by entering a technician. Technician

fields.description: The number of work orders the technician has worked

fields.name: Orders
fields.description: on.

fields.name: Parts
fields.description: The total amount (in dollars) of parts sold on the work orders the selected technician worked on.

fields.name: Labor
fields.description: The total amount of labor hours charged to the work orders the selected technician worked on.

fields.name: Other
fields.description: Any other miscellaneous charges associated with the work orders worked on by the selected technician.

fields.name: Total
fields.description: The total amount of charges for work orders worked on by the selected technician.
